capabilities.name: amgmcp_query_azure_subscriptions
capabilities.description: List subscriptions reachable by the AMG identity.

capabilities.name: amgmcp_cost_analysis
capabilities.description: Cost breakdown for a subscription scope and time window.

capabilities.name: amgmcp_query_resource_graph
capabilities.description: Kusto-style queries over the Azure Resource Graph.

capabilities.name: amgmcp_query_resource_metric_definition
capabilities.description: List available metrics for a resource type.

capabilities.name: amgmcp_query_resource_metric
capabilities.description: Fetch Azure Monitor metrics for a batch of resources.

capabilities.name: amgmcp_query_activity_log
capabilities.description: Management-plane activity log entries for a scope and window.

capabilities.name: amgmcp_query_resource_health
capabilities.description: Availability transitions for a resource over a window.
